hypotheses.name: 3-phase sprint works across project types
hypotheses.evidence: Ninth project type (server-side crypto + push API + client IDB + SW). All gates first pass. 7 atomic commits. Context compressed once but workflow unaffected.

hypotheses.name: Gates catch real issues
hypotheses.evidence: Gates passed first try. E2E: 160 passed, 47 pre-existing CSP failures (within baseline ~46 range). No regressions introduced.

hypotheses.name: Skills are followed by agents
hypotheses.evidence: 5/5 instructions compliant. Generic push payloads (Content-Length: 0). Push cleanup on destruction. User opt-in only. VAPID from env. SW self-contained.
